title: org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.util
description: This directory contains utilities for the Hadoop MapReduce framework. It includes classes for converting counter data to and from a compact string format, as well as package-info files for the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.util package.

TITLE: org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.util

DESCRIPTION:
This directory contains utilities for the Hadoop MapReduce framework. It includes classes for converting counter data to and from a compact string format, as well as package-info files for the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.util package.
